chatbot.welcome: Hi! I'm the ShifaCare Assistant. Ask me about booking, payments, or describe your symptoms and I'll point you to the right department and doctor.
chatbot.disclaimer: Not a substitute for a real doctor

footer.tagline: Modern hospital management delivering compassionate care with technology across Bangladesh.

aboutPage.intro: ShifaCare was founded with a single purpose — to make quality healthcare accessible, transparent and seamless for every patient. From appointment booking to prescription management, we digitise the entire patient journey.
bullets: Serving patients across multiple hospital branches
Fully digital appointment and prescription system
Integrated online payment via bKash, Nagad & card
Dedicated dashboards for doctors, patients and admin
aboutPage.missionText: To deliver accessible, affordable and world-class healthcare by connecting patients with the right specialists quickly — removing barriers of time, geography and paperwork through smart digital tools.
aboutPage.visionText: To become Bangladesh's most trusted hospital management platform — a system where every citizen can access premium healthcare at the touch of a button, with complete transparency and dignity.

values.title: Compassion
values.desc: Every patient is treated with empathy, dignity and individual attention.

values.title: Integrity
values.desc: Transparent pricing, honest diagnosis, and ethical medical practice at every step.

values.title: Excellence
values.desc: We hold ourselves to the highest standards of medical care and continuous improvement.

values.title: Teamwork
values.desc: Multidisciplinary collaboration between specialists for holistic patient outcomes.

aboutPage.ctaText: Book an appointment with one of our specialists today.

faqs.q: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.a: Visit our Doctors page, choose a specialist, pick an available date and time slot, and confirm. You receive a serial number immediately.
We accept bKash, Nagad, Rocket, Visa and MasterCard via SSLCommerz. You can also pay cash at reception.
Yes. Log into your patient dashboard and cancel any pending appointment. Rescheduling requires cancelling and rebooking.

faqs.q: How do I get my prescription?
faqs.a: After your consultation the doctor issues a digital prescription. It appears in your dashboard and can be downloaded as a PDF.
All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. Only you, your doctor, and authorized hospital staff can access your records.
Yes, our emergency department operates 24/7. For life-threatening emergencies please call 999 or come directly to the hospital.

homePage.ctaTitle: Ready to Take Control of Your Health?
homePage.ctaText: Join thousands of patients managing their healthcare seamlessly. Book your first appointment in under 2 minutes.
